title: Ack
description:
Synchronous receipt acknowledgement returned for every accepted Beckn request.
Supports both the v2.0 format (status + signature CounterSignature) and the
v2.0-rc1 legacy format (ack_status + transaction_id + timestamp) via oneOf
for backward compatibility.

oneOf.title: Ack v2.0
oneOf.description:
New v2.0 Ack format carrying an HTTP Counter-Signature proving the receiver
authenticated, received, and processed the inbound request.

status.description: ACK if the request was accepted; NACK if rejected.

signature.description:
Counter-signature proving the receiver authenticated and processed
the inbound request.
